blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,986 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
